[type]
Parser

[grammar]
grammar T;
@parser::members {enumKeyword = True}
primary
    :   ID {print("ID " + $ID.text, file=self._output)}
    |   {not self.enumKeyword}? 'enum' {print("enum", file=self._output)}
    ;
ID : [a-z]+ ;
WS : [ \t\n\r]+ -> skip ;

[start]
primary

[input]
enum

[errors]
"""line 1:0 no viable alternative at input 'enum'
"""
